_comment: SHA-256 content hashes for HDRi assets fetched by tools/fetch-hdri.ps1. Pinned to detect CDN/MITM/upstream-account-takeover swaps. To re-pin after a deliberate asset refresh: download once, compute Get-FileHash <file> -Algorithm SHA256, update the value here, commit. All assets sourced from Polyhaven (CC0) at 1K resolution.
